modal.name: Name
modal.nameHint: Use the full name to make search and identification easier.
modal.emailHint: This address is used for the invitation and access-related notifications.
modal.addUserDescription: Fill in the essential information and define the new user's access level.
modal.editUserDescription: Update this user's information, assigned firm, or access rights.
modal.identitySectionDescription: These details identify the user throughout the application and related communications.
modal.accessSectionDescription: Choose the firm, role, and status that apply as soon as the user is saved.
modal.firmHintAdmin: The super administrator can assign this user to any firm.
modal.firmHintLocked: Your account firm is applied automatically and cannot be changed.
modal.roleSummaryUser: Standard access to the business features available to this user.
modal.roleSummaryLocalAdmin: Administration limited to the assigned firm and allowed admin screens.
modal.roleSummaryAdmin: Full access to all firms, data, and administration screens.
modal.statusSummaryActive: The account can be used immediately after invitation or sign-in.
modal.statusSummaryInactive: The account stays disabled until it is re-enabled.
modal.statusSummaryPending: The account exists but still awaits effective activation.
modal.roleCardUser: Standard access and actions within the allowed scope.
modal.roleCardLocalAdmin: Operational administration for a single firm.
modal.roleCardAdmin: Global control over the platform and every firm.
modal.logoHint: Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG. Max size: 2 MB

messages.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
messages.userCreatedInvitationSent: User created successfully. An invitation email has been sent.
messages.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP and SVG are accepted
messages.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Max size: 2 MB
messages.cannotDeleteFirmWithUsers: Cannot delete this firm because users are associated with it
messages.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
messages.userInvitationNotice: An invitation email will be sent to the user so they can define their password on first access.
messages.forcePasswordResetDescription: User {{name}} will be required to replace their password. A secure email link will be sent.
messages.forcePasswordResetEmailNotice: This email is sent with the Gmail account configured in GDPR settings.
